title: Genomic DNA extraction from mosquitoes
author: Fabio Gomes
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.d7h9j5

steps.title: Prepare and grind mosquitoes
steps.instruction: Freeze mosquitoes and separate 1 mosquito per tube. Add 25 uL of fly grinding buffer. Grind mosquitoes with a pestle.

steps.title: Rinse pestle
steps.instruction: Rinse pestle with 25 uL of buffer.

steps.title: Centrifuge
steps.instruction: Centrifuge at max speed for 15 min at RT

steps.title: Precipitate DNA and centrifuge
steps.instruction: Collect supernatant and add 0.7 vol (28 uL over 40 uL) of room temperature of isopropanol (or 1 vol of ice cold 100% EtOH) and incubate for 5 min at room temperature. Centrifuge at RT for 15 min at max speed. 00:05:00
